name: MACOM Technology Sol.Hldg.Inc.R
summary: MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. designs and manufactures high-performance analog RF, microwave, millimeterwave, and photonic semiconductor products and components. The company's products are used in a variety of applications, including telecommunications infrastructure, data centers, industrial, defense, and medical. MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. is headquartered in Lowell, Massachusetts, USA.
